D:prop.A:calendar-data: BEGIN:VCALENDAR VERSION:2.0 PRODID:-//PIM Sync Engine//Stalwart Harness//EN CALSCALE:GREGORIAN BEGIN:VEVENT UID:allday-2005@test.local DTSTAMP:20260101T000000Z DTSTART;VALUE=DATE:20260401 DTEND;VALUE=DATE:20260402 SUMMARY:All-day event (zoneless date) DESCRIPTION:A date-only all-day event. No timezone\, no DST\, never zone-att ached. TRANSP:TRANSPARENT END:VEVENT END:VCALENDAR

BEGIN:VCALENDAR VERSION:2.0 PRODID:-//PIM Sync Engine//Stalwart Harness//EN CALSCALE:GREGORIAN BEGIN:VEVENT UID:floating-2006@test.local DTSTAMP:20260101T000000Z DTSTART:20260415T120000 DTEND:20260415T130000 SUMMARY:Floating-time event (no zone) DESCRIPTION:Wall-clock with no TZID and no UTC marker\; resolves through the observer's zone. END:VEVENT END:VCALENDAR

BEGIN:VCALENDAR VERSION:2.0 PRODID:-//PIM Sync Engine//Stalwart Harness//EN CALSCALE:GREGORIAN BEGIN:VTIMEZONE TZID:Europe/Amsterdam BEGIN:DAYLIGHT TZOFFSETFROM:+0100 TZOFFSETTO:+0200 TZNAME:CEST DTSTART:19700329T020000 RRULE:FREQ=YEARLY;BYDAY=-1SU;BYMONTH=3 END:DAYLIGHT BEGIN:STANDARD TZOFFSETFROM:+0200 TZOFFSETTO:+0100 TZNAME:CET DTSTART:19701025T030000 RRULE:FREQ=YEARLY;BYDAY=-1SU;BYMONTH=10 END:STANDARD END:VTIMEZONE BEGIN:VEVENT UID:virtual-2004@test.local DTSTAMP:20260101T000000Z DTSTART;TZID=Europe/Amsterdam:20260312T170000 DTEND;TZID=Europe/Amsterdam:20260312T173000 SUMMARY:Video call with a virtual location DESCRIPTION:Carries an RFC 7986 CONFERENCE property (a virtual location / co nference link). CONFERENCE;FEATURE=VIDEO;LABEL="Join the meeting";VALUE=URI:https://meet.exa mple.com/harness-room END:VEVENT END:VCALENDAR
